'''takowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscietra|oscietra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscietra|oscietra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| takowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækeweth|tækeweth]] || [[word:tækewej|tækewej]] || [[word:tækewesh|tækewesh]] || [[word:tækewe|tækewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takokowoth|takokowoth]] || [[word:takokowoj|takokowoj]] || [[word:takokowosh|takokowosh]] || [[word:takokowo|takokowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takowoth|takowoth]] || [[word:takowoj|takowoj]] || [[word:takowosh|takowosh]] || [[word:takowo|takowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takofwoth|takofwoth]] || [[word:takofwoj|takofwoj]] || [[word:takofwosh|takofwosh]] || [[word:takofwof|takofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takowotho|takowotho]] || [[word:takowojo|takowojo]] || [[word:takowosho|takowosho]] || [[word:takowoko|takowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takowoth|takowoth]] || [[word:takowoj|takowoj]] || [[word:takowosh|takowosh]] || [[word:takowo|takowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takowothol|takowothol]] || [[word:takowojol|takowojol]] || [[word:takowoshol|takowoshol]] || [[word:takowokol|takowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takowothotho|takowothotho]] || [[word:takowojojo|takowojojo]] || [[word:takowoshosho|takowoshosho]] || [[word:takowoko|takowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takowothon|takowothon]] || [[word:takowojon|takowojon]] || [[word:takowoshon|takowoshon]] || [[word:takowokon|takowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takowothoro|takowothoro]] || [[word:takowojoro|takowojoro]] || [[word:takowoshoro|takowoshoro]] || [[word:takowokoro|takowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
